CICS.description: Customer Information Control System - online transaction processing
CICS.recommended: API Gateway + Lambda for request/response; ECS for long-running
CICS.fsi_considerations: Ensure transaction atomicity, implement idempotency keys

IMS_TM.recommended: API Gateway + Lambda with DynamoDB for message queuing
IMS_TM.fsi_considerations: Map IMS transaction codes to API routes

BATCH.recommended: Step Functions for orchestration + Lambda/Batch for compute

TSO_ISPF.description: Time Sharing Option / Interactive System Productivity Facility
TSO_ISPF.recommended: Cloud9 for development, SSM for operations

DB2.recommended: Aurora PostgreSQL for most DB2 migrations
DB2.fsi_considerations: Validate SQL compatibility, stored procedure conversion, referential integrity

IMS_DB.recommended: DynamoDB for hierarchical data; Aurora if relational queries needed
IMS_DB.fsi_considerations: Map segment hierarchies to DynamoDB single-table design

VSAM_KSDS.recommended: DynamoDB with partition key matching VSAM primary key
VSAM_KSDS.fsi_considerations: Ensure key uniqueness, handle alternate index migration

VSAM_ESDS.recommended: S3 for append-only logs; Kinesis for streaming
VSAM_ESDS.fsi_considerations: Maintain insertion order, audit trail compliance

QSAM.description: Queued Sequential Access Method - flat files
QSAM.recommended: S3 for batch files, EFS for shared file access
QSAM.fsi_considerations: Encrypt at rest (S3 SSE-KMS), lifecycle policies for retention

MQ_SERIES.recommended: Amazon MQ for lift-and-shift; SQS for cloud-native
MQ_SERIES.fsi_considerations: Message ordering, exactly-once delivery, dead letter queues

CICS_TS_QUEUES.description: CICS Temporary Storage / Transient Data queues
CICS_TS_QUEUES.recommended: ElastiCache for TS queues; SQS for TD queues

FTP_CONNECT_DIRECT.fsi_considerations: Encryption in transit, PCI-DSS compliance for file transfers

RACF.recommended: IAM roles and policies; Identity Center for user federation
RACF.fsi_considerations: Map RACF profiles to IAM policies, maintain separation of duties

TOP_SECRET.recommended: IAM + KMS for encryption, Secrets Manager for credentials
TOP_SECRET.fsi_considerations: Audit trail via CloudTrail, key rotation policies

SMF.recommended: CloudWatch for metrics, CloudTrail for audit, OpenSearch for log analytics
SMF.fsi_considerations: Retain logs per regulatory requirements (7+ years for SOX)
